infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RedDot needs your location to find nearby safe spaces and send it with SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: RedDot needs background location for SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RedDot needs microphone access for panic recording.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RedDot needs camera access for evidence recording and journal media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RedDot needs photo library access to attach evidence to journal entries.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: RedDot uses Face ID to protect your private data.

plugins.cameraPermission: RedDot needs camera access for evidence recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RedDot needs your location for SOS alerts and finding nearby safe spaces.

plugins.faceIDPermission: RedDot uses Face ID to protect your private data.
